case_title: GOODFELLOW JAMES F. VS GRANNY'S MOVERS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $667.00 FILED BY GOODFELLOW JAMES F. AS TO DEFENDANT GRANNY'S MOVERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.
